title: Chocolatey Delight
body: I ONLY post my newer mods and mod updates to Modrinth! If you see my mods being uploaded to other websites under my name, THAT IS AN IMPOSTER AND IT HAS BEEN DONE SO WITHOUT MY PERMISSION! PLEASE DO NOT REUPLOAD MY MODS TO OTHER WEBSITES!!! NEVER DOWNLOAD UNOFFICIAL REPOSTS OF MY MODS, AS I DO NOT ENDORSE THEM AND ESPECIALLY BECAUSE THEY COULD BE VIRUSES!!! The ONLY exception are mods hosted on Planet Minecraft with older versions of my mods as that is where I originally started out sharing them! **It is Highly Recommended you use JEI for Recipes!** Chocolatey Delight is a small, light-weight mod for crafting delicious edible confections, that give different effects depending on the type of chocolate made using them! Below is the current list of chocolates and their affects-Which last about one minute each: - Regular Milk Chocolate - Haste - Dark Chocolate - Night Vision - Sweet Berry Chocolate - Jump Boost - Mint Chocolate - Fire Resist - Caramel Chocolate - Attack Boost - Honey Chocolate - Health Boost - White Chocolate - Water Breathing - Ruby Chocolate - Regeneration - Golden Chocolate - Absorption, Regen, Fire Resist, Health Boost Future/Planned Chocolate Additions: Tempered Chocolate Ingot, Block and Gear - Literally Cook Up your own Tools and Armor with Chocolate!
